description: Standard format for wiki skills — frontmatter, required sections, algorithm structure. Reference via schema_ref in process files.

field_specs.name: related
field_specs.description: Standard wiki cross-links. For skills: links to related framework docs, language guides, concepts — auto-suggested during creation.

required_sections.format: List with read/edit/write permissions: - read: OK | edit: REQUIRED | write: NEVER
Numbered steps (1. 2. 3.) with conditional logic if applicable
required_sections.description: Step-by-step execution flow — this is the core of the skill
required_sections.note: R07 applies: examples/edge cases in algorithm ARE conditional logic, never remove without audit

category_taxonomy.description: Tool usage — scripts, CLI tools, automation

constraints: NEVER duplicate logic from rules/ — use schema_ref instead (R01)
Algorithm must be self-contained — no forward references to other skills
Each skill file = one pattern/pattern-family only (Single Responsibility)
Skills SHOULD link to relevant wiki docs (framework/lang/best-practices) — auto-suggested during creation, not enforced
Skills MUST use standard 'related' field — NOT new/custom fields. Use wiki-relative paths to docs/concepts/entities.

naming_convention.description: All skill files must end with '-skill.md' suffix for easy differentiation from other wiki pages (concepts, entities, etc.) during directory scan and search.
